name: Apple Pear Watermelon
description: A crisp fusion of orchard-fresh apple and juicy pear, finished with a splash of sweet watermelon. Refreshingly complex.

name: Banana Smoothie
description: Creamy, ripe banana blended into a luscious smoothie experience. Sweet, velvety, and irresistibly smooth.

name: Black Cherry Pomegranate
description: Deep, dark cherry entwined with tangy pomegranate. A bold and sophisticated berry blend.

name: Black Forest
description: Rich chocolate meets dark cherry in this decadent dessert-inspired classic. Indulgent and mysterious.

name: Blueberry Blast
description: An explosive burst of wild blueberry intensity. Pure, vibrant, and unmistakably bold.

name: Blueberry Bubblegum
description: Sweet nostalgic bubblegum infused with plump blueberry. Playful and perfectly sweet.

name: Cherry Pomegranate
description: Bright cherry balanced with tart pomegranate. A timeless combination with a vibrant edge.

name: Chupa Chups Grape
description: The iconic grape lollipop flavor, faithfully recreated. Sweet, bold, and unmistakably fun.

name: Cucumber Grape Cactus
description: Cool cucumber meets sweet grape and exotic cactus. An unexpected, refreshing journey.

name: Kiwi Mulberry
description: Tangy kiwi paired with rich, sweet mulberry. A tropical-meets-forest berry experience.

name: Lemon Cola
description: Classic cola fizz brightened with a squeeze of fresh lemon. Nostalgic with a citrus twist.

name: Mango Lime
description: Tropical mango sweetness cut with sharp lime zest. Sunshine in every draw.

name: Mango Peach Watermelon
description: A tropical trio of ripe mango, soft peach, and juicy watermelon. Lush and layered.

name: Miami Mint
description: Cool, crisp mint with a breezy Miami vibe. Clean, invigorating, and endlessly refreshing.

name: Skittles
description: A rainbow of fruity candy flavors merged into one. Taste the entire spectrum.

name: Strawberry Candy
description: Sweet strawberry hard candy, perfectly captured. Nostalgic sweetness at its finest.

name: Strawberry Watermelon
description: Ripe strawberry meets juicy watermelon in this crowd-favorite duo. Sweet and refreshing.

name: Tobacco
description: Rich, earthy tobacco with a smooth finish. For the purist who appreciates tradition.

name: Watermelon Coconut
description: Sweet watermelon blended with creamy coconut. A tropical paradise in every puff.
